title: Discuss health habits
subtitle: Talk about balance, not perfection.
overview: Health topics need routine, advice, and personal limits.

items.es: Intento caminar todos los días, aunque no siempre puedo.
items.en: I try to walk every day, although I cannot always do it.

items.es: Me cuesta dormir temprano porque trabajo mucho.
items.en: Sleeping early is hard for me because I work a lot.

items.es: Debería beber más agua durante el día.
items.en: I should drink more water during the day.

items.es: Lo importante es crear hábitos realistas.
items.en: The important thing is to create realistic habits.

items.es: No hace falta ser perfecto, pero sí constante.
items.en: It is not necessary to be perfect, but it is necessary to be consistent.
